evals.prompt: Pressure-test my thesis on Nvidia and tell me what could make the bull case wrong over the next 18 months.
evals.expected_output: Routes to using-research/investment-research because the request is explicitly an investment thesis analysis grounded in company and market data.

evals.prompt: Run a TAM/SAM/SOM analysis for AI coding copilots in Europe and show the key assumptions.
evals.expected_output: Routes to using-research/market-research because the main artifact is a named market-sizing framework report.

evals.prompt: I need a comprehensive briefing on nuclear fusion commercialization, who the serious players are, and what the next five years might look like.
evals.expected_output: Routes to using-research/research-assistant because the request is a broad deep-dive briefing rather than an investment workflow or named market framework.
